projects.title: Smart Hospital Patient Monitoring System
projects.description: Smart Hospital Patient Monitoring System Situation: Manual patient monitoring was inefficient. Task: Build an IoT-based monitoring dashboard. Action: Used Python and Streamlit for real-time visualization. Result: Improved monitoring efficiency and alert handling.

projects.title: Handwritten Digit Classifier Project
projects.description: Handwritten Digit Classifier Project Situation: Digit recognition was error-prone. Task: Create automated recognition system. Action: Trained CNN model using MNIST dataset. Result: Achieved high prediction accuracy.

sections.experience: Collaborated in team-based academic projects with defined responsibilities. Presented research and project outcomes during internal evaluations. Applied classroom concepts to real-world problem statements.
